title: vlense
description: Vision-language OCR and multimodal document QA for images and PDFs.
achievements: structured OCR for images and PDFs with markdown, html, and json outputs
page-level retrieval and grounded document QA with cited answers

title: envman
description: Zero-hassle CLI for managing project environment files with encryption and cross-project access.
achievements: encrypted env storage with sqlite and keychain-friendly workflows
cross-project access patterns for local development teams

title: loki
description: An AI-powered CTF solver and security analysis assistant.
achievements: tui-first workflows for quick triage during ctf competitions
pluggable analysis flows for common ctf categories

title: acc-excl
description: Know everything about your leads with AI-powered research.
achievements: structured lead research summaries from sparse inputs
hackathon iteration loop from idea to deployed demo

title: auditoor
description: An AI tool for quickly understanding large Web3 codebases and identifying issues for rapid bug fixes.
achievements: high-level codebase maps for unfamiliar smart contract repos
issue-oriented prompts tuned for security review workflows

title: image compressor
description: An in-browser image compressor and resizer.
achievements: simple resize and quality controls for quick exports
